reasoning: Your primary limiter is a poor lactate clearance, which leads to reduced power on longer efforts. After an extended rest, it's crucial to ramp up intensity gradually. This workout prepares you for the Alpine Loop by addressing your endurance and lactate threshold needed for the main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of: 6min @ 218W (Zone 2) + 3min @ 255W, focusing on maintaining good form and clearing lactate effectively.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
